title: canthium quadratum
intro: Canthium quadratum, also known as the African mist tree or forest ivy, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Canthium quadratum are attributed to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help in reducing fever, relieving pain, and easing respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
